Bash("/c/Users/Acer Nitro 5/anaconda3/envs/rasa310/python.exe" -c "
import requests, json

SUPABASE_URL = 'https://hxeyrlacblbbfflfyqyb.supabase.co'
TOKEN = 'sbp_d015af5b3ab0cd13cc09da20ea1e2101194c689d'

headers = {
    'apikey': TOKEN,
    'Authorization': f'Bearer {TOKEN}',
    'Accept': 'application/openapi+json'
}

r = requests.get\(f'{SUPABASE_URL}/rest/v1/', headers=headers\)
print\('Status:', r.status_code\)
if r.status_code == 200:
    data = r.json\(\)
    paths = data.get\('paths', {}\)
    tables = [p.strip\('/'\) for p in paths.keys\(\) if p.strip\('/'\)]
    print\('Tables/Views:'\)
    for t in sorted\(tables\):
        print\(' -', t\)
    print\(\)
    print\('Total:', len\(tables\)\)
else:
    print\(r.text[:500]\)
")

Bash("/c/Users/Acer Nitro 5/anaconda3/envs/rasa310/python.exe" -c "
import requests, json

PROJECT_REF = 'hxeyrlacblbbfflfyqyb'
TOKEN = 'sbp_d015af5b3ab0cd13cc09da20ea1e2101194c689d'
headers = {'Authorization': f'Bearer {TOKEN}', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'}

tables = ['church_VMD', 'church_beliefs', 'church_core_values', 'church_history', 'profiles']

for table in tables:
    r = requests.post\(
        f'https://api.supabase.com/v1/projects/{PROJECT_REF}/database/query',
        headers=headers,
        json={'query': f\\"SELECT * FROM {table} LIMIT 3;\\"}
    \)
    print\(f'=== {table} ==='\)
    try:
        data = r.json\(\)
        print\(json.dumps\(data, indent=2\)\)
    except:
        print\(r.text\)
    print\(\)
")
